title: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.Link
description: Link is a link to another app.

name.description: The name of the link, E.g. "Workflow Logs" or "Pod Logs"

target.description: Target attribute specifies where a linked document will be opened when a user clicks on a link. E.g. "_blank", "_self". If the target is _blank, it will open in a new tab.

url.description: The URL. Can contain "${metadata.namespace}", "${metadata.name}", "${status.startedAt}", "${status.finishedAt}" or any other element in workflow yaml, e.g. "${io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.metadata.annotations.userDefinedKey}"
